task.title: Switch owned MCP tool names to underscores

events.content: Use action-oriented underscore MCP tool names only: Use action-oriented underscore MCP tool names only

raw.question: Use action-oriented underscore MCP tool names only
raw.chosen: Use action-oriented underscore MCP tool names only
raw.reasoning: The owned MCP server no longer needs to preserve @relaycast/mcp compatibility for the major release, and underscore names like add_reaction and post_message are easier for agents and MCP clients than dotted names.

retrospective.summary: Renamed owned Relaycast MCP tools from dotted namespaces to action-oriented underscore names, removed dotted registrations, updated prompts/skills/bootstrap docs, and validated the CLI/MCP focused Vitest suites.
